name: Paylocity
description: One unified platform for HR, Finance, and IT. Connect people, processes, and data. Automate tasks and drive business growth. Learn more about Paylocity

reviews.review_title: So user friendly even a grandma can navigate
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It was a smoother transition switching from another popular payroll app which i am greatful for. Not a headache at all. The app is easy to navigate and has a lot more features than the other. 100% i like it.
reviews.review_pros: I am a grandma i didnt have computer class i had typewriter class so i am not tech savvy at all. I was nervous having to use a new app. However to my surprise navigation of the app is simple. I love that you can clock in and out on the app and can look at your hours with ease and if there is a discrepancy you are able to put in a request to have it changed to the hours on the clock you know to be true like if you forget to punch in or out. It gets fixed so fast. Keeping your work hours accurate for the pay period.
reviews.review_cons: Putting in for PTO on an emergency and then having it approved only to have it denied right before payday. I wish it would send a notification text saying this was the case so i wasnt shocked at my paycheck. Some of us depend on a certain amount of money on payday and when its 400 dollars short it is a shocker and stresser.

reviews.review_title: Very pleased with switching to Paylocity
reviews.review_description: What Paylocity offers is great. Every Paylocity employee we have worked with is very nice. My only complaint is our main contact seems to change frequently.
reviews.review_pros: The ease of everything being in one place. It's not just payroll, it is training, recruiting and expense reports. We can use it on a desktop or on our phones. The mobile app is great for our employees who are on the road most of the time.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes as an administrator it is not as intuitive as I would like. Some features I don't use all the time. When I do have to use it, I have to re-educate myself on how to do it.

reviews.review_description: Neutral. With separate systems and teams, it takes more effort than expected to resolve issues involving more than one system or team. It feels as if Paylocity's system has plateaued in dashboards, benefits, reporting and overall system functionality. I'm starting to feel that other platforms can offer a more dynamic and supportive option with easier interfaces, insights and reporting.
reviews.review_pros: Consolidating all services into one integrated platform. We use Recruiting, Onboarding, HRIS, Benefits (Bswift) to COBRA (WEX), including Section 125 spending accounts, and Compensation modules.
reviews.review_cons: Annual Benefits process for Open Enrollment. The experience with a new team for our 2026 OE was the most challenging of my career, with multiple errors, workflow issues, incomplete work and many phone calls and emails to reach a resolution. I have no recourse to elevate issues above the team that is problematic. Reporting is challenging. There are many options but not always the ones we need. The report writer to create customer reports is also challenging to use unless you watch training courses. Account and sales managers change without advance notice. It is rare that an account manager will reach out to check in and offer support. Outreach is either reactive to an issue submitted, or to pitch a new offering.

reviews.review_description: Overall, Paylocity’s software is powerful, intuitive, and designed to support modern, paperless workflows.
reviews.review_pros: Paylocity is a powerful and easy-to-use payroll platform with impressive functionality. The software includes thoughtful features like built-in payroll notes that make it easy to stay completely paperless and keep all documentation in one place. The seamless integration from recruiting and onboarding through payroll was a key reason we chose Paylocity, and it truly delivers an efficient, all-in-one experience.
reviews.review_cons: Keeping a good payroll account manager. Whenever we've had a good one assigned, they get promoted or leave the company. On the positive side we've had great luck with the random service rep you get when you call in for help.

reviews.review_description: Paylocity is very user friendly and always is updating their processes to better our use of the system
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and quick feedback and response from Paylocity when need of help. My favorite feature that I use is the Recruiting/Onboarding feature.
reviews.review_cons: Not really a least, but I do get constant calls and messages saying they are locked out of Paylocity and they are having to reset their password.

reviews.review_description: We have continually added features in Paylocity and grown the system to our needs. Payroll is great, but also having expense reimbursement, spending account management, recruiting capabilities and COBRA all in one place as been a game changer for us!
reviews.review_pros: Paylocity can handle and streamline all of our company's needs in one place. From recruiting, to training and through offboarding, Paylocity has supported our needs in every way.
reviews.review_cons: During Benefits open enrollment the last two years, I have worked with a person (2) who has very little experience and it's been frustrating and time consuming.

reviews.author_profession: Director of HR and Asst Practice Administrator
reviews.review_description: I have used 3 other HR Platforms prior to finding Paylocity and I will NEVER use another. Their customer service is A++, very knowledgeable with prompt attention to any matter. One important aspect of having a company like Paylocity is "trust", I have a lot of trust in the company as a whole. They stand behind their product. I have been with Paylocity for 5 years and continue to be a satisfied customer. They continue to add features across all areas ie: Payroll, HR, Community etc. I would highly recommend Paylocity!
reviews.review_pros: Paylocity's customer service is excellent. All representatives are very knowledgeable and well trained. If I call with a question or send an email it is promptly addressed. I love their new streamlined Payroll process. It is user friendly and they have a variety of integrations available. Paylocity also has a wide range of reports that you can run or customize. Time and Labor serves our 3 office locations well and is easy to use and integrate into Payroll.
reviews.review_cons: I am 100% satisfied with the features I use though Paylocity. I do not have the need to utilize some of the modules like workflows, performance or recruiting, so I cannot give an intelligible review on those modules. Personally, I do not have any cons to list for what I use Paylocity for, they meet all of our needs and more!

reviews.review_description: Paylocity is easy to use for both the employees and administrators. Their representatives are friendly and the cost fits within our budget.
reviews.review_pros: Paylocity provides the same services as ADP which we used for decades and is much less expensive which works for us as we have under 50 employees.
reviews.review_cons: We are a small group (under 50 employees). When I call Paylocity for help I'm given a team member that at least half the time cannot answer my question and they have to put in a service ticket for help. It can sometimes take months to resolve an issue especially if it is related to any tax issue.

reviews.review_title: Three Times In, and Paylocity Still Impresses
reviews.review_description: This is my third time working with Paylocity, and I continue to bring it to every organization I join because it delivers the right balance: powerful enough for HR and Payroll, yet intuitive, simple, and accessible for everyone else. Paylocity also consistently enhances its platform in meaningful ways. Most importantly, I’ve always experienced a genuine ‘people‑first’ culture in how you support and care for your employees.
reviews.review_pros: I love the philosophy behind everything you do about your product and services. It aligns well with ours. It's designed to support human decisions, not just process transactions. It's usable and intuitive. And it's agile to the changing needs of the clients.
reviews.review_cons: While I’m very satisfied overall, I do wish the Performance and Compensation modules were more robust.

reviews.review_title: Simple and Supportive, but Limited in Flexibility
reviews.review_pros: There was a lot of built-in support and guidance, so it didn’t require a dedicated HRIS person to manage or maintain the system.
reviews.review_cons: The simplicity was a double-edged sword. It wasn’t very customizable, which made it harder to tailor to more complex or evolving needs.

reviews.review_description: I've been working with Paylocity for almost 3 and a half years. The product has been getting better since we started. Always room for improvement.
reviews.review_pros: It has good value. Payroll is easy to process. Customer support is better than some of the other brands out there.
reviews.review_cons: Reports writer and general reports need work. Sometimes when new modules roll out, they do not work very well.

reviews.review_title: Paylocity is a level above the rest when it comes to payroll and HR
reviews.review_description: From our rushed implementation we needed to our end employees interactions with the app and system. We have been very happy with our team, the service and our everyday tasks. I would highly recommend anyone using Paylocity as it checks all the boxes for price, usability and available products included with the system.
reviews.review_pros: It is extremely easy to use. The cost is extremely competitive compared to other products. The staff is very knowledgeable and very helpful. The system is very efficient and simple to navigate.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes the help desk support can be a little slow but they always follow through. Reports can be a little cumbersome.

reviews.review_title: Value vs Results Can't be Beat
reviews.review_description: Every system has its pros and cons but with Paylocity the pros far outweigh the cons. They are also continually developing the system in positive ways which makes me optomistic that they will develop into an even better system over time.
reviews.review_pros: As an HR Consultant who uses all the HR systems out there, Paylocity is the one I recommend the most. The functionality for its price point can't be beat and can be used as a true "all in one" system without the need for supplemental systems. It is also relatively user-friendly.
reviews.review_cons: I wish they offered more functionality in the employee app (ex. ability to update direct deposit and sign off on reviews). I also wish the format of the reports was more friendly to filtering and pivot tables.

reviews.review_description: I am huge Paylocity fan! I will also suggest your team with my other HR connections. I am looking forward to the new features, training and adding more employee reward services.
reviews.review_pros: The constant improvement. The verification process gets easier and more efficient over time. I enjoy the report tracking and analytics!
reviews.review_cons: Some reporting is only offered with a PDF results. I prefer these reports to be in either excel or CSV to be able to filter sections for clean results.

reviews.review_title: Paylocity HR & Payroll removes the stress from single person department!
reviews.review_description: Moving the department into 20th century has been excellent. The department as a whole is enjoying the platform and ease of use. Administration enjoys the reporting capability and the information that can be gathered so quickly.
reviews.review_pros: After a full year using Payloicity, my role as one person HR department is easier. Customer support is excellent. Being able to answer employees questions regarding pay and leave is easier than using the old spreadsheet and DOS based payroll system. All the reports which have been set-up and the new options which I'm discovering make the job easier and more pleasant. Had been looking forward to retirement; but, may stay a few more years now. Thanks Paylocity!
reviews.review_cons: Starting the process, as a one person department it was demanding to get regular task completed and give attention to needs of Paylocity team. I felt rushed and unheard. Now in year two, we are having to make corrections - not ideal; but, working the process. Set-up team was not as knowledgeable in governmental projects as we needed them to be - this did get corrected as we went along.

reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Paylocity has been very favorable. The platform consistently delivers a reliable, user‑friendly solution that supports a wide range of HR and payroll needs. Its intuitive design, comprehensive features, and strong performance have made daily tasks more efficient across the organization. Additionally, the customer support team has been responsive and helpful, contributing to a smooth and positive experience. Overall, Paylocity has proven to be a valuable tool that enhances both HR operations and employee engagement.
reviews.review_pros: Customer Support has been responsive, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. Issues are resolved quickly, and the team provides clear guidance whenever assistance is needed.
reviews.review_cons: At this time, I do not have any cons to report. My experience across all key areas has been consistently positive.

reviews.review_description: When we started using Paylocity, 5 years ago, it was a nightmare. It took me almost 2 years to clean after implementation was completed. Some codes were pre-tax, and they needed to be post-tax, etc.
reviews.review_pros: My current account manager and her predecessor are great,[sensitive content hidden]. Reports are easy to read and understand.
reviews.review_cons: CS at the beginning was a nightmare. Paylocity removes reports. The "Master Labor Distribution" was removed, and we used it a lot. I don't have an account manager for Benefits.

reviews.review_pros: supports many system and device, has all the basic features are easy to use and understand. The AI assistant feature is helpful.
reviews.review_cons: Not a ton of customization available without needing a integration. More transparency on PDRs, we have a hard time tracking the status of the PDR submitted, we have to ask for updates every time, I wish there is a portal/dashboard we can track it by the PDR number.

reviews.review_description: Overall I am happy we made the switch to Paylocity. The employee experience is easy for the field guys to use, and payroll processing/administration is clean and simple.
reviews.review_pros: Paylocity has been easy to use! The layout is very clean and it is easy to find what you're looking for. They handle all our IRS filings and has helped us stay compliant with on-time filings.
reviews.review_cons: Paylocity pushes out a lot of updates, which is typically great because they seem to take feedback seriously and make changes whenever they see fit, but sometimes it's hard to keep up with the changes.

reviews.review_title: Great time-card and paycheck app for when you have a large crew!
reviews.author_profession: After school and summer camp teacher
reviews.review_description: I found Paylocity a great app for both our afterschool program as well as our summer camp program. Teachers and staff were able to login or clock in for their shift. If there was an error there are multiple options to correct the error and have a supervisor fix it. there are so many features that allow you to Remind employees or participants of trainings of activities of anniversaries or birthdays there are opportunities for you to give praise and you’re easily able to see your upcoming and past paychecks. It was just a great app for our program.
reviews.review_pros: It is so simple to use, it offers options for reminders, trainings, team/co-worker birthdays and shout outs, and did I mention it’s easy to use!
reviews.review_cons: It requires WiFi, if you are using the app for clocking in and out of a shift and you are in a “dead zone” you will not be able to clock in or out.

reviews.review_description: Happy with this service, everything is detailed. It provides all the necessary information for us as employees.
reviews.review_pros: We switched from Paycom to Paylocity and I think it was the best thing we could have done, easy to use, up-to-date payroll processing and understandable, reflected payments, balance of days off, and many other things that the application provides. customer support is great also
reviews.review_cons: I like everything, that change from Paycom to Paylocity was for my benefit. I have no doubt about how to use this application on the phone and computer.

reviews.review_description: Paylocity Recruiting works for the size company that we are; simply out of the box. However, as a recruiting team, we've learned that many of the functions that may exist, are not accessible by recruiters if they do not have the onboarding function. What I find most debilitating is that after having exhausted my search of tools/resources, but still have questions, I do not hear back from our designated representative. In fairness, I understand that we were recently given a new rep, however, leading up to just a few weeks ago, I would never hear back and when I did, she first went to another employee who is listed as primary contact (as to validate my question).
reviews.review_pros: Specific to Recruiting platform, the ease in moving candidates through and effectiveness in message outreach.
reviews.review_cons: The reporting. I feel that it is not intuitive, therefore causes a clunky process that leaves me questioning the validity of the data. Ease of using and sharing repeatable form templates with hiring stakeholders; specifically allowing hiring stakeholders to review recruiter feedback, then using the same form, insert their interview feedback so that it is one document of feedback that is retained for record keeping.

reviews.review_description: Best customer service and a great value, unlike ADP that charges for every little thing. Paylocity's customer service team are helpful, friendly and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_pros: The platform is extremely easy to use. Reporting doesn't require and IT background, it is very simple to use. Our employees find the mobile app to be user friendly and reliable.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes the system seems to glitch while processing payroll. Not a huge deal, because I process well before my cut off time. I have found logging out and back in fixes it.

reviews.review_description: From a payroll leadership perspective, I appreciate the system’s integration between payroll, HR, and time & labor. That connectivity reduces manual processes, improves data accuracy, and strengthens audit controls, which are critical at scale. The platform is also user-friendly, which is excellent for staff at different levels.
reviews.review_pros: I am especially impressed by how the Paylocity platform integrates payroll with HR, benefits, and workforce management. From a director-level perspective, that level of integration allows for stronger data integrity, better reporting, and more strategic insights for clients. There is also great customer support and ease of use.
reviews.review_cons: One area that could be improved in Paylocity is the customization of reporting. Sometimes generating highly specific reports requires extra steps or workarounds. That said, it helped me develop stronger problem-solving skills.

reviews.review_description: Overall, Paylocity is a very strong HRIS system and provides all the tools we need to support our organization. The onboarding module is especially impressive, as it creates a smooth and professional process that leaves a very positive first impression on our new employees.
reviews.review_pros: Great HRIS system! It’s very user-friendly, and I appreciate that the team is always looking for ways to improve the platform. My favorite feature is how simple open enrollment is through the portal once everything is set up. The automated file feeds are also excellent — once configured, they eliminate the need to manually add information to carrier sites, which saves a significant amount of time.
reviews.review_cons: The benefits support team has not been the best in my experience. However, when I call about other issues, the support staff are typically quick to respond and very helpful. Reporting functionality could also be improved, as there are additional charges for special report configurations, which can be frustrating when trying to access the specific data you need.
